nodes.context: Street gang active in Prairie provinces of Canada, involved in drug trafficking and violence.
Vietnamese gang in Edmonton that folded after convictions in 2002; predecessor to Crazy Dragons.
White supremacist gang that was kidnapped and beaten by Crazy Dragons in 2004.
Asian-Canadian gang in Calgary involved in gang war with Fresh Off the Boat Killers; bought guns from Crazy Dragons.
Asian-Canadian gang in Calgary involved in gang war with Fresh Off the Boat gang.
Outlaw motorcycle club; in Alberta described as less powerful than Crazy Dragons by 2012, but in BC Crazy Dragons were subordinate to them.

edges.context: Crazy Dragons succeeded the Trang gang after it folded in 2002.
Crazy Dragons kidnapped and beat up five members of White Boy Posse in 2004.
Crazy Dragons served as gunrunners selling guns to Fresh Off the Boat gang during a gang war.
Gang war between the two Asian-Canadian gangs in Calgary.
In British Columbia, Crazy Dragons were described as subordinate to Hells Angels.
